nodes.label: tools/tracing.py  Lightweight, dependency-free-ish observability for the diacrit
Thin wrapper around a SQLite file. Safe to share across a process --     includi
Attributes every LLM call to the agent that made it by walking up the     parent
Fetch the Trace for the currently-running `trace_run` block, if any.
Open a new trace for one `agent.invoke(...)` attempt. Generates a fresh,     uni
